metadata.title: When Smokey Sings (The Miami Mix)
metadata.lyrics:
[01:47.34] Debonair lullabies
[01:49.71] In melodies revealed
[01:53.59] In deep despair on lonely nights
[01:57.25] He knows just how you feel
[02:01.12] The slyest rhymes, the sharpest suits
[02:04.62] In miracles made real
[02:08.34] Like a bird in flight on a hot sweet night
[02:12.48] You know you're right just to hold her tight
[02:16.54] He soothes it right, makes it out of sight
[02:20.28] And everything's good in the world tonight
[02:23.94] When Smokey sings, I hear violins
[02:31.54] When Smokey sings, I forget everything
[02:39.09] As she's packing her things
[02:41.29] As she's spreading her wings
[02:43.25] The front door might slam
[02:44.74] But the back door it rings
[02:46.81] And Smokey sings, he sings
[03:08.93] Elegance in eloquence
[03:13.56] For sale or rent or hire
[03:17.25] Should I say yes and match his best
[03:20.95] Then I would be a liar
[03:24.80] Symphonies that soothe the rage
[03:28.76] When lovers' hearts catch fire
[03:32.60] Like a bird in flight on a hot sweet night
[03:36.59] You know you're right just to hold her tight
[03:40.36] He soothes it right, makes it out of sight
[03:44.28] And everything's good in the world tonight
[03:48.37] When Smokey sings, I hear violins
[03:55.32] When Smokey sings, I forget everything
[04:02.72] As she's packing her things
[04:05.07] As she's spreading her wings
[04:06.86] Smashing the hell
[04:08.54] With the heaven she brings
[04:10.56] Then Smokey sings, he sings
[04:15.21] (Would it be true to say)
[04:49.76] Luther croons
[04:51.08] Sly's the original originator
[04:56.46] James screams
[04:59.05] Marvin was the only innovator
[05:04.43] But nothing can compare
[05:07.84] Nothing can compare
[05:09.60] When Smokey sings
[05:26.98] When Smokey sings, I hear violins
[06:17.84] When Smokey sings, I forget everything
[06:26.09] As she's packing her things
[06:30.13] As she's spreading her wings
[06:35.18] She threw back the ring
[06:38.61] When Smokey sings
[06:42.96] Smokey sings
[06:46.85] Smokey sings
